Thanks for contributing to MRI!
Keep PRs focused: one logical change per pull request.
If this PR is not ready for review, open it as a draft.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Keep it concise. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues this PR addresses. Use "Closes #123" to auto-close on merge. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal (no user-facing behavior change)
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how a reviewer can reproduce them. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My change follows the project's code style and passes lint + type checks.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that prove my fix or feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation where needed.
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes).
- [ ] This PR does not introduce any secrets, credentials, or telemetry.
- [ ] I understand MRI is MIT-licensed and I agree my contribution is released under the MIT License.

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots, etc. -->
